description: Plugins from the Circumpunct Framework by Ashman Roonz

plugins.name: circumpunct-ethics
plugins.description: Ethical reasoning, virtue diagnostics, and Noble Lie detection based on the Circumpunct Framework. Four pillars (Good, Right, True, Agreement), four virtues (Plasticity, Access, Curiosity, Validation), Noble Lie cognitive virus model with truth gate analysis, two-channel love theory, installation depth spectrum, multi-scale discourse analysis (interpersonal to public media), commercialized Noble Lie detection, steelman construction, and restoration protocol. Created by Ashman Roonz.
